# service/coffee/repository/coffee-repository

> **Service Layer**

Coffee repository — Effect [Context.Tag](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) service definition and
[in-memory](variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md) implementation.

## Remarks

This module defines the data-access contract
([CoffeeRepositoryShape](interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md)) for coffee drink persistence and
provides a concrete [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) backed by a static in-memory array
([coffeeDrinks](#)).  The repository interface is designed to be
swap-friendly: replacing the in-memory layer with a database-backed
implementation requires only a new [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) — consuming code
remains unchanged because it depends solely on the
[CoffeeRepository](classes/CoffeeRepository.md) tag.

## Interfaces

| Interface                                                    | Description                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeRepositoryShape](interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md) | Data-access contract for [Coffee](../../types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) drink persistence. |

## Classes

| Class                                           | Description                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ----------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [CoffeeRepository](classes/CoffeeRepository.md) | Effect [Context.Tag](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) that identifies the [CoffeeRepositoryShape](interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md) service in the dependency graph. |

## Variables

| Variable                                                          | Description                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [InMemoryCoffeeRepository](variables/InMemoryCoffeeRepository.md) | [Layer](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) providing an in-memory [CoffeeRepositoryShape](interfaces/CoffeeRepositoryShape.md) implementation backed by the static [coffeeDrinks](#) array. |
